channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Pacific Island Countries Are Highly Vulnerable to Oil Supply and Pricing
item.description: The closure of the Strait of Hormuz is havingsignificant impacts on the Pacific Island countries, which are highly vulnerable to both oil pricing and supply

item.title: The Houthi Threat: Is Trump Underestimating One of Iran’s Key Remaining Cards?
item.description: The Houthis have entered the war in Iran. Whether they choose to block Bab al-Mandab or not could have significant consequences for the global economy.
